scripts.build: bun run build:portal-ui && bun run build:accounting-ui && bun run build:trade-ui && bun run build:payroll-ui && bun run build:hr-ui && bun run build:crm-ui && bun run build:erp-ui
scripts.dev: bun run dev:portal-ui & bun run dev:accounting-ui & bun run dev:trade-ui & bun run dev:payroll-ui & bun run dev:hr-ui & bun run dev:crm-ui & bun run dev:erp-ui & cd packages/portal-api && bun run dev:unified
scripts.start:legacy: bun run start:portal & bun run start:accounting & bun run start:invoicing & bun run start:warehouse & bun run start:payroll & bun run start:hr & bun run start:crm & bun run start:erp
scripts.dev:legacy: bun run dev:portal & bun run dev:accounting & bun run dev:invoicing & bun run dev:warehouse & bun run dev:payroll & bun run dev:hr & bun run dev:crm & bun run dev:erp
scripts.dev:portal: bun run dev:portal-api & bun run dev:portal-ui
scripts.dev:accounting: bun run dev:accounting-api & bun run dev:accounting-ui
scripts.dev:trade: bun run dev:trade-ui & cd packages/portal-api && bun run dev:unified
scripts.dev:payroll: bun run dev:payroll-api & bun run dev:payroll-ui
scripts.dev:hr: bun run dev:hr-api & bun run dev:hr-ui
scripts.dev:crm: bun run dev:crm-api & bun run dev:crm-ui
scripts.dev:erp: bun run dev:erp-api & bun run dev:erp-ui
scripts.dev:desktop: bun run dev:desktop-api & bun run dev:desktop-ui
scripts.build:desktop: bun run build:desktop-ui && cd packages/desktop/src-tauri && cargo build --release
scripts.tauri:build: bun run build:desktop-ui && cd packages/desktop && cargo tauri build
